narrative:
Darby-South (precinct in Pickaway County) has 648 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
